title: dryopteris fraseri
intro: Dryopteris fraseri, also known as Fraser's fern or golden shield fern, is a species of fern native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris fraseri include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Dryopteris fraseri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
